navigation.cdss: Taking you to the Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS). Here you'll find 12+ active rules that flag potential concerns, drug interactions, and WHO/PAHO protocols.
navigation.scribe: Perfect! Taking you to the Co-Pilot. This tool transcribes your consultations in real-time and generates SOAP notes automatically, saving you 3-4 hours daily.
navigation.prevention: Directing you to the Longitudinal Prevention Hub. Here you can see 30-year timelines, 7 health domains, and over 100 preventive interventions based on WHO/PAHO/USPSTF protocols.
navigation.patients: Taking you to the Patient Management Portal. From here you can see all your patients, their complete history, and access the patient portal that reduces your calls by 40%.
navigation.pricing: Sure! I'll show you our pricing plans. We offer from the free Starter plan to personalized Enterprise. All include medical AI, automated prevention, and support in English.
navigation.login: Taking you to the login page. You can sign in with Google or with your Holi Labs account.
navigation.dashboard: Taking you to the main Dashboard where you can see a summary of your active patients, scheduled appointments, pending prescriptions, and more.

aiCommandCenter.defaultResponse:
I understand you're looking for "{query}".

I can help you with:
• **Prevention**: 30-year longitudinal system with automatic alerts
• **Co-Pilot**: Real-time transcription and SOAP notes (saves 3-4h/day)
• **CDSS**: 12+ clinical support rules with WHO/PAHO protocols
• **Patients**: Complete portal that reduces calls by 40%
• **E-Prescribing**: Digital signature to 8+ integrated pharmacies

What would you like to know more about?

hero.headline:
4 hours typing.
11 minutes healing.
hero.subhead: Clinical intelligence that gives doctors their time back — and administrators the revenue they already earned.

roi.physicianBefore: 15 min typing per patient. Template hunting. Copy-paste SOAP.
roi.physicianAfter: 90 seconds to review. Structured. Coded. Signed.
roi.adminBefore: Denial letter arrives 6 weeks later. Revenue lost. Audit. Rework.
roi.adminAfter: Flagged in real time. Corrected before submission.
roi.testimonialQuote: We went from 12 minutes per note to a 90-second review. The billing flags alone paid for the first month.

roiFinance.statLabel: of LATAM claims rejected due to documentation gaps
roiFinance.headline: Stop losing revenue you already earned.
roiFinance.description: Every rejected claim is revenue your hospital earned but never collected. Holi Labs cross-references every encounter against ICD-10, TUSS, and CBHPM codes in real time, flagging gaps seconds after they occur.

roiTime.headline: 90 seconds to review. Not 15 minutes to type.
roiTime.description: The Co-Pilot listens to every patient conversation and generates structured SOAP notes as the consultation unfolds. Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan. All populated in real time. Your doctors review and sign. That's it.

howItWorks.headline:
Deterministic AI.
Not a black box.
howItWorks.subhead: Every flag traces to a published guideline or a government billing code.
howItWorks.step1Desc: The consultation happens exactly as it always has. No new screens. No workflow changes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Safety checks and billing validation process in real time against local regulatory standards.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Gaps, interactions, and codes appear before the patient leaves.
howItWorks.differentiator: No hallucinations. No guesswork. Every alert has a published source.

security.headline: Zero PHI in the cloud. Period.
security.description: Patient health information never leaves your network unencrypted. On-premise rules. De-identified AI pipeline. LGPD-compliant by design.

cta.headline: Get early access.
cta.subhead: Priority onboarding. Free pilot tier. Shape the roadmap.
cta.successMsg: You're on the list. We'll reach out within 48 hours.
cta.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cta.disclaimer: No PHI collected. LGPD-native. Response within 48 hours.

footer.brandSub: Real-time clinical intelligence for Latin American healthcare.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Holi Labs. All rights reserved.
footer.badges: LGPD-native · ANVISA Class I · FHIR R4

hero.headline: Transparent pricing for every hospital size.
hero.subhead: No hidden fees. No per-query charges. One predictable price per practitioner.

pricing.currency: Prices shown in USD. Local currency invoicing (BRL, BOB) available.

safety.name: Holi Safety
safety.description: Essential safety checks for clinics with 5-50 practitioners.

complete.name: Holi Complete
complete.description: Full platform for hospitals with 50-500 beds.

governance.name: Holi Governance
governance.description: Enterprise governance for insurers and operadoras.

items.question: Do I need to replace my current EHR?
items.answer: No. Holi runs silently alongside your existing systems via our API or web portal.

items.question: Is patient data LGPD compliant?
items.answer: Yes. We process rules using an on-premise architecture or stripped data. Zero PHI is stored in our cloud.

items.question: How fast is implementation?
items.answer: The API wedge can be implemented by your IT team in under 48 hours.

items.question: Do you support local billing codes?
items.answer: Yes, the Holi engine natively supports TUSS, SUS, and ICD-10 cross-referencing.

items.question: Can we run a pilot before committing?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day retrospective data pilot to show you exactly how many rejected claims we would have caught.

cta.headline: Not sure yet? See it in action.
cta.subhead: Try the live demo. No sign-up required.

error.failsafeOverlay: This is a failsafe overlay so we can see the real error.

certificados.securityNote: Private keys never leave your browser
certificados.securityFooterBody: Your private key is processed entirely in your browser using the Web Crypto API. Only the public certificate and metadata are transmitted to the server.
certificados.privateKeyNotice: Private keys are never uploaded or stored on our servers.

clinicalCommand.tourLiveScribeContent: Real-time transcription with automatic PHI de-identification. Every name, date, and identifier is masked before storage. HIPAA and LGPD compliant by design.
clinicalCommand.tourSoapContent: The AI auto-populates structured Subjective, Objective, Assessment, and Plan fields as the conversation progresses. Sign & Bill when the encounter is complete.
clinicalCommand.tourCdssContent: CDSS analyses the full transcript against clinical guidelines and flags drug interactions, contraindications, and protocol gaps. Ask follow-up questions in the chat.

intake.dataProcessingDesc: I authorise Holi Labs to process my personal and health data for the purpose of direct patient care, in accordance with LGPD Art. 11, § 2, I.
intake.aiAnalysisDesc: I consent to my de-identified data being used to improve AI clinical decision-support models. Data is anonymised before any model training (LGPD Art. 7, IX).
intake.crossBorderDesc: I authorise transfer of my data to cloud infrastructure outside Brazil where adequate protection measures are in place (LGPD Art. 33, II).
intake.privacyNoticeDesc: I acknowledge receipt and understanding of the Holi Labs Privacy Notice and HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices.
intake.consentsRequired: All four consents are required before proceeding. Each is separately recorded and anchored to an immutable audit entry.

intake.intakeSubmittedDesc: The intake form has been signed and a hash-chained audit entry has been recorded. Consent records are now individually anchored to the patient file.

baa.title: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
baa.subtitle: Manage the Business Associate Agreements (BAA) required by HIPAA for healthcare organizations.
baa.baaDescription: A Business Associate Agreement is a contract required by HIPAA (45 CFR § 164.504(e)) between a Covered Entity (your organization) and a Business Associate (Holi Labs). The BAA establishes the responsibilities and safeguards to protect Protected Health Information (PHI).
baa.baaTemplateDesc: Download the official Business Associate Agreement template from Holi Labs. This template includes all provisions required by HIPAA (45 CFR § 164.504(e)).

prescriptions.noActiveDesc: You don't have any active prescriptions
prescriptions.noHistoryDesc: You don't have any prescription history
prescriptions.noAllDesc: You don't have any prescriptions yet
prescriptions.statusReadyDesc: Your prescription has been filled and is ready to pick up
prescriptions.statusSentPharmacyDesc: Your prescription has been sent to the pharmacy
prescriptions.statusApprovedDesc: Your prescription has been signed by your doctor
prescriptions.pharmacyContact: Your prescription has been sent to the pharmacy. Contact them to confirm when it will be ready.
prescriptions.helpIntro: If you have questions about your prescriptions:
prescriptions.helpTip1: Contact your healthcare provider through secure messaging
prescriptions.helpTip2: Call the pharmacy if you need to check on pickup times
prescriptions.helpTip3: Always follow your doctor's instructions for taking medications
prescriptions.helpTip4: Report any side effects to your healthcare provider immediately

healthMetrics.title: Detailed Health Metrics

healthMetrics.noDataForRange: No readings in this time range
healthMetrics.outsideRange: This reading is outside the normal range. Please consult your doctor.
healthMetrics.outsideFunctional: This reading is outside the optimal functional range. Monitor closely.

preventionHub.title: Prevention Hub
preventionHub.subtitle: Your preventive health data and recommendations
preventionHub.allCurrent: You are up to date with all your interventions!
preventionHub.noGoalsDesc: Talk to your doctor to set personalized goals
preventionHub.emptyDesc: Your doctor will soon share your preventive health profile. Here you can see your risk scores, recommended interventions, and health goals.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View and manage your personal information

security.title: Security & Sessions
security.subtitle: View active sessions and login history

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Controls
privacy.subtitle: Manage who can access your medical data. Your privacy is in your hands.
privacy.lgpdNoticeBody: Under Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD), you have the right to access, correct, delete, and port your personal data. Each consent below shows the legal basis and what data is shared.
privacy.consent_whatsapp_reminders_desc: Receive appointment reminders and confirmations via WhatsApp
privacy.consent_whatsapp_reminders_data: Appointment dates, times, and provider names
privacy.consent_lab_notifications_desc: Get notified when new lab results are available
privacy.consent_lab_notifications_data: Notification that results are ready (no clinical values)
privacy.consent_promotional_content_desc: Receive preventive health tips and wellness content by email
privacy.consent_rnds_sharing_desc: Share clinical records with Brazil's national health data network
privacy.consent_rnds_sharing_data: Clinical encounters, lab results, prescriptions (FHIR R4 format)
privacy.consent_rnds_sharing_recipient: RNDS — Rede Nacional de Dados em Saúde (Ministry of Health)
privacy.consent_research_anonymization_desc: Contribute anonymized data to clinical research and quality improvement
privacy.consent_research_anonymization_data: De-identified clinical data (no names, IDs, or dates of birth)
privacy.downloadDesc: Download a complete copy of all your health data, including lab results, prescriptions, appointments, and clinical notes. Your data will be exported as a ZIP file. (LGPD Art. 18, III)
privacy.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and personal data. Some records are retained by law.
privacy.retainItem1: Audit logs (access records) — required for 5 years
privacy.retainItem2: Clinical records signed by your physician — retained per medical regulations
privacy.deleteConfirmPrompt: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Are you sure?
privacy.lgpdFooterBody: This platform complies with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados — Lei 13.709/2018). All access to your medical data is logged and audited. You have the right to request a complete report of who has accessed your information at any time.

notificationSettings.title: Notification Preferences
notificationSettings.subtitle: Configure how and when you want to receive notifications
notificationSettings.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications
notificationSettings.deniedHelp: Notifications are blocked in your browser. To enable them, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
notificationSettings.messagesDesc: New messages from your medical team
notificationSettings.alertTestSent: Test notification sent! Check your browser.

appointmentRequest.emergencyWarning: Important: If this is a medical emergency, call 911 or go to the ER immediately.
appointmentRequest.notesPlaceholder: Any additional information you consider important...
appointmentRequest.successMessage: Your appointment request has been received. We'll contact you soon to confirm.
appointmentRequest.whatNextStep1: We'll review your request and doctor availability
appointmentRequest.whatNextStep2: We'll contact you to confirm the exact date and time
appointmentRequest.whatNextStep3: You'll receive a reminder 24 hours before your appointment

appointmentDetail.cancelModal_body: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment? This action cannot be undone.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred in the patient portal. Please try again.

medicationDetail.doctorWillReview: Your doctor will review this request and contact you soon to confirm.

consultations.title: My Consultations
consultations.subtitle: Review recordings and notes from your medical consultations
consultations.noRecordingsDesc: Recorded consultations will appear here after your appointments
consultations.tip1: Your doctor may record consultations to generate accurate medical notes
consultations.tip2: You can listen to the audio and read the notes whenever you need
consultations.tip3: Recordings are private and protected with encryption

consultationDetail.noAudioSupport: Your browser does not support the audio element.

messagesPage.noConversationsDesc: Your doctor will send you a message when available

profilePage.title: My Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Personal information and medical data
profilePage.shareDesc: Show this QR to your doctor. When scanned, they can request access and you can approve or reject from Holi Labs.
profilePage.privacyNote: Privacy: the QR does not reveal PII; it only initiates a request that requires your approval.

fhir.title: FHIR Medical Records
fhir.subtitle: Access your medical records in FHIR (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) format
fhir.fhirDesc: FHIR is an international standard for health information exchange. Your records in this format can be securely shared with other health systems.
fhir.metaDescription: Access your medical records in standard FHIR format

forms.completed: This form has already been completed

formReview.title: Final Review
formReview.subtitle: Please review your answers before signing and submitting
formReview.signDesc: Please sign in the box below with your finger or mouse
formReview.termsConfirm: I confirm that I have reviewed all my answers and the information provided is correct. I understand that this electronic signature has the same legal validity as a handwritten signature.
formReview.securityNotice: Your information is protected with enterprise-grade encryption
formReview.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

formSuccess.title: Form Submitted Successfully!
formSuccess.message: Thank you for completing the form. Your information has been received securely.
formSuccess.step1: Your healthcare provider will review the information you provided
formSuccess.step2: You will receive a copy of the completed form by email
formSuccess.step3: If additional information is required, we will contact you
formSuccess.securityNotice: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption and HIPAA compliance
formSuccess.safeToClose: You may safely close this window

auditor.title: Revenue Gap Auditor

auditor.noGapsFound: No gaps found for this filter.

transcriptPane.selectPatient: Select a patient above to begin recording.
transcriptPane.grantConsent: Grant patient consent below to enable recording.
transcriptPane.pressStart: Press Start Recording to begin the live transcript.
transcriptPane.authorizationRequired: Patient authorization is required prior to audio capture
transcriptPane.verbalConsentText: "I am informing you that this consultation will be recorded for documentation purposes. The recording will be used solely for your medical records and clinical decision support. You may revoke consent at any time. Do you agree to proceed?"
transcriptPane.confirmVerbalAgreement: Confirm patient's verbal agreement, then press Record to begin.

clinicalChatBar.placeholder: Ask anything, @ to mention, / for workflow…

aiCopilot.subtitle: Intelligent clinical assistant • Holi Labs
aiCopilot.apiKeyHint: Your API key is stored locally and never shared. Only used to connect with {provider}.
aiCopilot.cdsWarning: ⚠️ Clinical Decision Support (CDS): This system is NOT diagnostic. All recommendations must be validated by a medical professional.

commandSettings.title: Command Center Settings
commandSettings.devicePairingInfo: Connect multiple devices using QR codes. Each device can have granular permissions that expire after 24 hours for security. All data is synchronized in real-time across paired devices.

deidTest.inputPlaceholder: Enter text with protected health information (PHI)...
deidTest.tokenMapWarning: Token Map Generated: The encrypted token map has been generated. In production, this must be stored securely to allow authorized re-identification.
deidTest.tokenMapDesc: The encrypted token map has been generated. In production, this must be stored securely to allow authorized re-identification.
